meaning: 伯克利[美国加利福尼亚州西部城市]
examples: Stanford and Berkeley yielded Silicon Valley.
Life in Berkeley is very pleasant and everything is so easy compared to Paris.
Every year Berkeley sends its fresh female physics PhDs to the country's top universities.
Mr. Saez is a professor of economics at UC Berkeley and a John Bates Clark medalist.
Also in the mix were Chinese teams from the Tsinghua-Berkeley Global Technology Entrepreneurship Program (GTE).
